messages.message:
Merry Christmas 

As the holiday season approaches, we just wanted to send our warm wishes to you and your family — wishing you peace, good health, and a successful year ahead.

This is Johnny from Axcor Pilates.
It was great connecting with you earlier and learning more about your plans. We work closely with studio owners and professional buyers worldwide, helping them source reliable, high-quality Pilates Reformers when the time is right.

If you’re still exploring options, planning a new studio, or considering equipment upgrades in the future, feel free to reach out anytime — we’re always happy to share insights, suggestions, or support whenever you need it.

Wishing you a joyful holiday season and a wonderful New Year 

— Johnny
Axcor Pilates

Thank you for contacting Sense Yoga and Pilates! 
We provide both group & private yoga and pilates classes

Group Class Trial Pack 
Yoga 3 Classes RM 79 
Pilates 3 Classes RM 199

We provide towels, yoga mat, lockers, water dispensers, waiting area and all the equipment needed 
Welcome to book trial class with us 

May I know are you interest with Eco Palladium or Permas City branch ?

Happy New Year 2026! 

Thank you for being part of our journey in 2025.
Whether we’ve already worked together or just connected, it truly means a lot.

Wishing you and your business a year filled with growth, clarity, and new opportunities.

Here’s to a strong, healthy, and successful 2026! 

Warm wishes,
Johnny

Hi 
Hope you’ve had a good start after the holidays.

Just wanted to share a quick update — we’ve recently added quite a few new models and updates to our range.
If you’d like, I can share the latest catalog or highlight what’s new, just for reference.

Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:
studio setup
resale / distribution
adding a few units to an existing business

We provide both group & private yoga and pilates classes♀️

Group Class Trial Pack 
Yoga 3 Classes RM 99
Pilates 3 Classes RM 199

We provide towels, yoga mat, lockers, water dispensers, waiting area and all the equipment needed 
Welcome to book trial class with us

May I know are you interest with Eco Palladium or Permas City branch ?
last_exchange.last_my_message:
Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:
studio setup
resale / distribution
adding a few units to an existing business
last_exchange.sequence: 客户最后发言，等待我方回复
